--- Bugbear — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):5+1=6 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):5+1=6 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 3/5 targets affected.
